h6462cc0dgeadfg4b70gad9cg8117aadfa647: I'm not fighting any more. Not even if someone calls me names.
h34429cf6g1ab9g48ddgb532g4fb118bc6598: I left my sword in the cave. Don't tell, but... I don't want to touch it again.
hd83fbd61g085bg47edg937dgeb680684908f: Bah! At your age, I'd already spilled my own cousin's blood. Face your fear, or it will devour you.
h15d9d81ag4440g41dbg9befg383a98eb03e1: It's all right, kid. Don't tell anyone - but I was afraid, too.
h79e56c8eg1994g4524ga993g325b10e893ff: Go away. Please, make them all just go away!
h014c37c9g1dd7g4ac8ga7f7gd68d5a502e10: I don't want to fight goblins. You can't make me!
